title: ArmorAlert
description: Alerts you when any piece of armor is low durability
body:
---

☕ Support My Work

If you would like to support me and my projects, feel free to buy me a coffee!


--- # Armor Alert Armor Alert is a lightweight utility mod that notifies you whenever your armor is low on durability. With message warning and sound warning. # Features: - **Durability Alerts**: Warns you when any piece of armor is below your chosen durability threshold. - **Configurable Cooldown**: Prevents alert spam by limiting how often warnings appear. - **Toggle Alerts**: Enable or disable alerts anytime with /armoralert toggle. - **Custom Warning Percentage**: Set the alert threshold with /armoralert percentage . - **Sound Notification**: Optional sound alert when durability is low. - **Actionable Messages**: Alert message appears in the middle of the screen. # Commands: - **/armoralert toggle** – Enable or disable armor alerts. - **/armoralert percentage** – Set the warning threshold for durability. - **/armoralert cooldown ** – Customize the cooldown between alerts. - **/armoralert sound on/off** – Enable or disable the alert sound.
